## How to test

<!-- Steps a reviewer can follow to verify the change. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (lint + typecheck + tests)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Added/updated tests (no live API calls — mocks only)
- [ ] Updated docs (`README.md` / `ARCHITECTURE.md`) if behavior changed
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under **Unreleased** if user-facing
- [ ] No secrets committed; cloud access stays read-only; local data stays local
